prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `52364a65`.
codex_response:
Implemented `52364a65` as an ARC2 task package. The rule is: each foreground object is trimmed by erasing any cells in its two leftmost occupied columns relative to that object’s own bounding box, so width-1 and width-2 objects disappear entirely. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint matched the official examples, and there was no `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` entry for this task.

Task package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_52364a65/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_52364a65/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_52364a65/generator.py#L136). The verifier removes the first two bbox columns per connected component; the generator builds four compact monochrome blobs on an `8` background, with a mix of narrow and wide widths so the output family matches the official task’s “some survive, some nearly vanish, some disappear” behavior. No new primitive was needed; `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was unchanged.

Validation passed end to end: official examples `3/3`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/52364a65/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/52364a65/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/52364a65/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/52364a65/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/52364a65/previews/preview_03.png). I also visually checked the preview sheet; it stays on-family with isolated compact shapes and correct left-side trimming.
